activated_rules.rule_name: Ytterligare EU-medlemsländer i fakturan vid namngivna länder i certifikatet

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Acoem AB' can be identified exactly as the issuing party on the invoice including the registered address and VAT number, after allowed normalization (capitalization, spacing, legal form). The consignor name and country Sweden match exactly between cert and invoice. No contradictory information detected.

consignee.certificate_value: AU VIET TECHNICAL EQUIPMENT JSC, 113/4D, Cong Lo Street, Ward 15, Tan Binh District, VN-70500 HO CHI MINH CITY, Viet Nam
consignee.invoice_value: Au Viet Techn Equip Joint Stock Comp, 113/4D Cong Lo Street, Tan Son Ward, VN-70500 HO CHI MINH CITY, VIETNAM
consignee.motivation: Consignee name from certificate and invoice correspond after normalization and abbreviation (JSC vs Joint Stock Comp). The consignee address and country Viet Nam are consistent. Certificate consignee matches invoice customer and delivery address as 'Au Viet Techn Equip Joint Stock Comp'.

goods_description.motivation: Certificate references invoice number 59948 and includes net weight. Invoice 59948 contains corresponding goods descriptions and package counts with matching identifiers. The general goods description in the certificate is allowed with invoice reference according to rule 4.3.5, no contradiction found.

quantity.motivation: Gross weight in certificate is '15,9 KG' and matches invoice gross weight '15,9 kg' exactly after normalization. Certificate quantity in box 7 matches invoice weight without conflict or missing units, no contradictions found.

origin.motivation: Certificate origin lists 'European Community; Sweden&France'. Invoice origin is 'European Community; Sweden'. The invoice origin matches all certificate origin countries explicitly or as EU members. The presence of France in certificate origin but not in invoice is allowed under rule 4.5.4.1.1 as invoice contains EU member countries stated in certificate. No non-EU origins contradict.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All applicable control points were matched exactly or within allowed normalization and rules. No mismatches or uncertainties were found.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter i certifikatet stämmer med fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt utan manuell granskning.
